_note: Devnet placeholder — no Adrena-owned ADX/ALP Switchboard feeds on devnet yet. Empty feed_map means adrena-data's ADX/ALP pricers skip the embedded primary and go straight to the legacy hardcoded paths (retries + on-chain simulation). Populate this file when Adrena ships devnet ADX/ALP feeds and the consumers will start using them automatically via the pin bump.
